snippets.text: Compensation is generally considered when arrival delay is at least 3 hours.
Cancellation claims can be valid unless carrier proves extraordinary circumstances.
Compensation levels are commonly 250, 400, or 600 EUR depending on flight distance and conditions.
Denied boarding/overbooking can qualify for EU261 compensation depending on circumstances.
For baggage issues, collect baggage tag, PIR report number, receipts, photos (damage), and timeline of loss/delay.
